name: Sonya Heartwell
description:
Hello again!

This time I'm coming with some more casual but more open idea.
With this bot I'm aiming to give you the absolute freedom for Fluff,
I wanted to make it possible so your character can be almost whatever you want with whatever scenario you want!
All because i feel like there are little to no bots that offer an absolute freedom of choice to what you can play as!
Also, I'm keeping my definition open so Feel free to copy it and make your own spin-offs!

It will be highly appreciated if you credit the original tho.

original image here

important note:

for the best experience follow this pattern in the first message:

`Your Scenario Here`

*****

Here write your message
creator: KoteuKoteuofski
